channel.title: SEIU Local 503 at OSU - News
channel.description: News and updates from SEIU Local 503 at Oregon State University.

item.title: We made noise. Management moved on steps.
item.description: Our bargaining team credits worker action with pushing management off its original step position. The movement matters, but 0% COLA and major takeaways remain.

item.title: More than 140 rally at Oregon State for fair classified staff contract
item.description: More than 140 members and supporters rallied at McNary Field and marched to Kerr Administration Building on June 30, the day our previous contract expired.

item.title: July 16 membership meeting moved to MU 215
item.description: The July 16 Local 083 membership meeting has moved from MU 211 to MU 215 after a double-booking. Join us at noon for TOGO'S sandwiches.

item.title: Our union bargaining update: 0% COLAs and a 19-year step path
item.description: Our bargaining team reports that management's latest offer includes zero percent COLAs over four years, a 19-year step path and proposed rollbacks to member rights.

item.title: 3 actions Local 083 members can take to win a fair contract
item.description: Email Oregon State University leadership, sign the strike pledge when it arrives and build our union for a fair contract.

item.title: Economics They Say / We Say
item.description: Management said it would provide economics proposals, but failed to bring them when expected. SEIU put our proposals forward for members to review and share.

item.title: Introducing our new Local 083 leadership team
item.description: SEIU Local 503, Local 083 introduces its new executive leadership team and authorized steward roster in a memo sent to OSU Employee and Labor Relations.

item.title: April 16 Bargaining Update
item.description: Read the bargaining-only April 16 membership meeting update, including bargaining timeline notes and next steps from the slide deck.

item.title: Bargaining Observation Time Update: 10:00 AM Moved to 1:15 PM
item.description: The bargaining observation was originally scheduled for 10:00 AM. Around 9:00 AM, management changed it to 1:15 PM. We are sending email updates and have updated the website.

item.title: Show Up on Zoom: Use a 2026 Bargaining Background
item.description: A shared Zoom background is a simple way to show solidarity in bargaining sessions, protect privacy, and keep the focus on our contract. Download the 2026 pack here.

item.title: 2026 Kickoff: Why This Year Matters
item.description: Join the fight for a fair contract. Recap of the Fighting for Higher Ed survey and the path to COLA and benefits. Attend the Jan 15 meeting.

item.title: Fighting for Higher Education
item.description: Join classified workers at Oregon’s Public Universities in the fight for fair wages, benefit protections, and union power. Sign the petition today!

item.title: Your Voice, Our Contract: Bargaining Survey Reminder
item.description: An update from the bargaining committee on the contract survey and the importance of members taking part.

item.title: Union Power Delivers
item.description: Victory! Your 3% union-won COLA arrives Nov 1, 2025. See the full breakdown of our last contract's wins and take the crucial 2025 bargaining survey now so we can win again!

item.title: Bowling Night Was a Striking Success!
item.description: A fun-filled bowling night brought our union members together for an evening of strikes, spares, and solidarity.

item.title: Make Your Voice Heard! The 2026 Bargaining Survey is Here!
item.description: The SEIU 503 bargaining survey for the 2026 contract is now open. Share your priorities and help shape our negotiations with OSU management.

item.title: Ice Cream Social Was a Sweet Success!
item.description: Our August 2025 ice cream social brought members together and strengthened our union community.
